issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures.
Skill is vendor-locked to Hermes Agent and assumes specific plugin environment.

scenarios.name: search-tweets-and-read-replies
scenarios.rationale: Response A outlines the required API calls but omits the summary of tweet IDs, reply counts, notable users, and the explicit no‑write statement, whereas Response B provides no relevant content.

scenarios.name: reply-with-approval
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required tweet_read, tweet_action, and reply ID/URL steps; B only marginally better by including an approval prompt.

scenarios.name: export-followers
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A does not provide any relevant content.
